name: clawsec
summary: A security tool with security holes
detail: Ironically, this security-focused skill has exploitable patterns
findings: Unvalidated external input passed to system commands
Excessive filesystem access beyond stated scope

name: safe-exec
detail: Misleading name conceals risky execution patterns
findings: Dynamic code execution via eval-like patterns
No sandboxing despite the name suggesting safety
